notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Jonah Heim reaches on a fielding error by center fielder Trent Grisham. Carlos Cortes scores. Tyler Soderstrom scores. Jonah Heim to 2nd.

notableEvents.detail: Carlos Cortes grounds into a double play, shortstop Anthony Volpe to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Darell Hernaiz out at 2nd. Carlos Cortes out at 1st.
